---
jupyter: python3
format: 
  pdf:
    echo: false
    geometry:
      - top=10mm        
      - left=10mm
      - right=10mm
      - bottom=20mm
      - headheight=40mm 
      - headsep=15mm 
      - includehead=true 
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{tabularx}
          \usepackage{multirow}
          \usepackage{graphicx}
          \usepackage{xcolor}
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \usepackage{lastpage}
          
          % Define the Page Style
          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhf{} 
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          
          % Define the Header Content
          \fancyhead[C]{
            \noindent
            \bgroup
            \def\arraystretch{1.4}
            \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{|p{5.5cm}|p{1.8cm}|X|p{1.2cm}|p{1.8cm}|}
            \hline
            \multirow{5}{5.5cm}{
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \includegraphics[width=4.5cm]{logo} \\
                \fontsize{6pt}{7pt}\selectfont
                \textbf{CIVIL \& ENVIRONMENTAL ENGINEERING,}\\
                SKEMPTON BUILDING, IMPERIAL COLLEGE\\
                LONDON, SOUTH KENSINGTON CAMPUS,\\
                LONDON SW7 2AZ.\\[3mm]
                \normalsize\textbf{CALCULATION SHEET}
            }
            & \textbf{Job No.} & & \textbf{Sheet} & \textbf{Ref} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \textbf{Job Title} & Steel Design Coursework & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\thepage\ of \pageref{LastPage}} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multicolumn{4}{p{\dimexpr\textwidth-5.5cm-8\tabcolsep-5\arrayrulewidth\relax}|}{
                \textbf{Subject} \newline
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \centerline{NS-Truss Sizing and Connection Calculations (Scheme 1)}
                \vspace*{1mm}
            } \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Client}} & \textbf{Made by} \quad JT MA & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date} \quad 29/03/2023} \\ \cline{3-5}
            & & \textbf{Checked by} & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date}} \\ \hline
            \end{tabularx}
            \egroup
          }
---


```{python}
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_excel('Section.xlsx')
ustr= 500.0
ystre = 355.0
ult = 42
print(df.columns)
```

* This shit is fucked `{python} ult` times 


```{=latex}
\vspace{5mm}
\noindent
\underline{\large\textbf{Material and Section properties (UKC356x406x634) {COLUMN C, BEAM D-C,C-B,B-A :}}}

\indent
\bgroup
\def\arraystretch{2} 
\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{@{} l X l X @{}}
Ultimate strength, & $f_{u} := 500 \cdot \textcolor{blue}{N \cdot mm^{-2}}$ 
& 2nd moment area Major axis, & $I_{y}:=275000 \cdot 10^{4} \cdot \textcolor{blue}{mm^{4}}$ \\
Yield strength, & $f_{y}:=355~\textcolor{blue}{N \cdot mm^{-2}}$ 
& 2nd moment area minor axis, & $I_{z}:=98100 \cdot 10^{4} \cdot \textcolor{blue}{mm^{4}}$ \\
Young modulus, & $E:=210 \cdot 10^{3} \cdot \textcolor{blue}{N \cdot mm^{-2}}$ 
& Radius of gyration major axis, & $i_{y}:=18.4 \cdot 10~\textcolor{blue}{mm}$ \\
Overall depth, & $h:=455.6~\textcolor{blue}{mm}$ & Radius of gyration minor axis, 
& $i_{z}:=11.0 \cdot 10~\textcolor{blue}{mm}$ \\
Width of section, & $b:=418.5~\textcolor{blue}{mm}$ 
& Elastic modulus major axis, & $W_{el,y}:=11600 \cdot 10^{3} \cdot \textcolor{blue}{mm^{3}}$ \\
Web thickness, & $t_{w}:=42.1~\textcolor{blue}{mm}$ 
& Elastic modulus minor axis, & $W_{el,z}:=4630 \cdot 10^{3} \cdot \textcolor{blue}{mm^{3}}$ \\
Flange thickness, & $t_{f}:=67.5~\textcolor{blue}{mm}$ 
& Plastic modulus major axis, & $W_{pl,y}:=14200 \cdot 10^{3} \cdot \textcolor{blue}{mm^{3}}$ \\
Root radius, & $r:=15.2~\textcolor{blue}{mm}$ 
& Plastic modulus minor axis, & $W_{pl,z}:=7110 \cdot 10^{3} \cdot \textcolor{blue}{mm^{3}}$ \\
Depth between fillet, & $h_{w}:=290.2~\textcolor{blue}{mm}$ & Warping Constant, & $I_{w}:=38.8 \cdot 10^{12} \cdot \textcolor{blue}{mm^{6}}$ \\
Area of section, & $A:=808 \cdot 10^{2} \cdot \textcolor{blue}{mm^{2}}$ 
& Torsional constant, & $I_{t}:=13700 \cdot 10^{4} \cdot \textcolor{blue}{mm^{4}}$ \\
\end{tabularx}
\egroup
\vspace{5mm}
```

```{python}

```

```{=latex}
\noindent
\underline{\large\textbf{Section Classification:}}
\vspace{2mm}

\indent
\bgroup
\def\arraystretch{2} 
\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{@{} X @{}} 
$\epsilon = \sqrt{\frac{235}{f_{y}}} = 0.814$ \\
$c = \frac{(b-t_{w}-2\cdot r)}{2} = 173~mm$\\
$\frac{c}{t_{f}} = 2.563 \quad \text{and} \quad 9\cdot\epsilon = 7.323$ \\
$c_{star} := h_{w} = 290.2~mm$ \\
$\frac{c_{star}}{t_{w}} = 6.893 \quad \text{and} \quad 33\cdot\epsilon = 26.849$ \\
Since $\frac{c}{t_{f}} < 9\cdot\epsilon \quad \text{and} \quad \frac{c_{star}}{t_{w}} < 33\cdot\epsilon$ \\
From Table 9.5, the cross section belongs to class 1. \\
\end{tabularx}
\egroup
\vspace{5mm}
```
{{<pagebreak>}}


```{=latex}
\noindent
\underline{\large\textbf{Buckling resistance of member in axial compression: GROUND COLUMN C}}
\vspace{2mm}

\indent
\bgroup
\def\arraystretch{1.8} 
\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{@{} X @{}}
\textbf{Effective length of column about y-y:} \\
$L_{cr,y} = \frac{6}{2}m = 3~m$ \\
$N_{cr,y} = \frac{(\pi^{2}\cdot E\cdot I_{y})}{{L_{cr,y}}^{2}} = 633299.616~\textcolor{blue}{kN}$ \\
$\lambda_{y} = \sqrt{\frac{(A\cdot f_{y})}{N_{cr,y}}} = 0.213$ \\
$\frac{h}{b} = 1.089 \quad (< 1.2)$ \\
$t_{f} = 67.5~mm \quad (< 100~mm)$ \\
Hence, use buckling curve \textbf{b} where $\alpha_{y} := 0.34$. \\
$\phi_{y} = 0.5 \cdot (1 + \alpha_{y} \cdot (\lambda_{y} - 0.2) + {\lambda_{y}}^{2}) = 0.525$ \\
$\chi_{y} = \frac{1}{\phi_{y} + \sqrt{{\phi_{y}}^{2} - {\lambda_{y}}^{2}}} = 0.995$ \\
\end{tabularx}
\egroup
\vspace{5mm}
```
```{=latex}
\noindent
\underline{\large\textbf{Hence the compressive resistance of the column about z-z is:}}
\vspace{2mm}

\indent
\bgroup
\def\arraystretch{1.8} 
\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{@{} X @{}}
$L_{cr\_z}:=\frac{6}{2}m=3~m$ \\
$N_{cT\_z}:=\frac{(\pi^{2}\cdot E\cdot I_{z})}{{L_{cT\_z}}^{2}}=225915.245kN$ \\
$\lambda_{z}:=\sqrt{\frac{(A\cdot f_{y})}{N_{cT\_z}}}=0.356$ \\
$\frac{h}{b}=1.089 \quad (< 1.2)$ \\
$t_{f}=67.5~mm \quad (< 100~mm)$ \\
Hence, use buckling curve \textbf{c} where $\alpha_{z} := 0.49$. \\
$\phi_{z}:=0.5\cdot(1+\alpha_{z}\cdot(\lambda_{z}-0.2)+{\lambda_{z}}^{2})=0.602$ \\
$\chi_{z}:=\frac{1}{\phi_{z}+\sqrt{{\phi_{z}}^{2}-{\lambda_{z}}^{2}}}=0.92$
\end{tabularx}
\egroup
\vspace{5mm}
```
{{<pagebreak>}}

```{=latex}
\noindent
\underline{\large\textbf{Hence, the compressive resistance of the column is reduced to:}}
\vspace{2mm}

\indent
\bgroup
\def\arraystretch{1.8} 
\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{@{} X @{}}
$\chi:=min(\chi_{y},\chi_{z})=0.92$\\
$N_{RD\_634\_6m}:=\chi\cdot A\cdot f_{y}=26394.708~kN$\\
\end{tabularx}
\egroup
\vspace{5mm}
```
